MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Late Expert Designations,
Off Calendar Sep-19-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Robert Burke, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Kuniko Tanaka

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED WITH MODIFICATION. Plaintiff Kuniko Tanaka's motion for leave to file late expert witness designation is granted on condition that counsel for plaintiff make the witness available for deposition forthwith. Plaintiff shall remit payment for the first hour of the witness' fee to counsel for defendant as well as any additional fees charged for the preparation of the transcription of the deposition.
MODIFICATION: Deleting compliance date of September 26, 2007 in light of continuance of trial. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL

MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel and Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved as to Defendant's Counsel only. The OSC to Plaintiff's Counsel is ordered re-set to 9/6/2007 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212.
